title: caleana granitica
intro: Caleana granitica, also known as the granite spider orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its delicate white flowers and long, thin leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Caleana granitica include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of coughs and congestion. Herbal preparations of Caleana granitica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
